attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

<summary>
  <request>Integrate EyeStrike2_BigWheel Spine animations with SpineKit into Feature Wheel flow</request>
  <investigated>Examined BaseSpine.ts reference implementation for SpineKit usage patterns. Reviewed how Spine animations are played using SpineKit's PlayAnimation method, skin switching via setSkin, and animation state management. Verified Type-to-Skin mapping logic and state machine flow for enter/exit animations.</investigated>
  <learned>Spine animations in this project must use SpineKit library for playback. BaseSpine.ts demonstrates the canonical pattern: using sp.Skeleton component, PlayAnimation via SpineKit wrapper with Promise-based control, skin switching with setSlotsToSetupPose after setSkin, and animation existence checks with cached lookups. The Feature Wheel flow requires: Idle → Active (enter) → Collect (loop during effect) → Out (exit) → Idle cycle.</learned>
  <completed>Implemented BigWheel Spine integration across 4 files: FeatureWheelTypes.ts (TYPE_SKIN_CONFIG mapping and TypeToSkin function), FeatureWheelManager.ts (m_bigWheelSpine property plus PlayEnter/PlayExit/PlaySpineOnce/PlaySpineLoop/SetSpineSkin methods, switched PlayLandAnnounce to use Collect animation, added ResumeIdle with Idle loop), FeatureWheelShowState.ts (state flow: Active enter → Collect loop → Out exit → Idle, removed temporary placeholders), and tests/FeatureWheelTypes.test.ts (7 new skin mapping assertions). TypeScript compilation passes with 0 errors on modified files. Tests show 438/439 passing (1 pre-existing failure unrelated to this work). Learning log documented MCP component reference pitfalls.</completed>
  <next_steps>Three manual editor tasks remain for user: (1) drag FeatureWheelResult/Spine to Manager's "BigWheel Spine" field, (2) set FeatureWheelResult node active to true, (3) set FeatureWheelResult/BG, Symbol, and JP nodes active to false. Awaiting user decision on whether to create separate ticket for pre-existing HasPostRespinFeature test failure and when to commit the completed code changes.</next_steps>
  <notes>Two placeholder TODOs remain pending art assets: Shift skin defaults to "default" until art provides it, and Active animation sync with Symbol_Wheel postponed due to missing resources. No commits made yet per user workflow preference. The implementation follows established SpineKit patterns from BaseSpine.ts rather than making API assumptions.</notes>
</summary>
```

content.thinking:
This is reading the SpineKit source code to understand how it works. The user is examining the implementation details of SpineKit.PlayAnimation method to understand:

1. It has flexible parameter options (either a spine skeleton + params, or an options object)
2. It handles audio clips mapped to animations
3. It manages animation mixing (checking if there's a mix time set between current and next animation)
4. Only clears track if there's no mix setup
5. Returns a Promise that resolves when animation completes (false) or is interrupted (true)
6. Sets up event listeners, complete listeners, and interrupt listeners
7. Has a force cancel mechanism

This is a discovery/learning observation about how SpineKit works internally.

```xml
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>SpineKit Animation Playback Architecture</title>
  <subtitle>SpineKit manages Spine animations with Promise-based control, audio sync, and animation mixing support</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>SpineKit.PlayAnimation returns Promise that resolves false on completion, true on interruption</fact>
    <fact>SpineKit checks for animation mix settings before clearing tracks to preserve blending transitions</fact>
    <fact>SpineKit.SetAudioClips maps audio files to animation names for automatic sound playback</fact>
    <fact>SpineKit maintains m_cancelCbs registry allowing ForceCancel to interrupt animations by spine name and animation name</fact>
    <fact>SpineKit.PlayAnimation accepts either flexible ISpineKitOptions object or individual parameters</fact>
    <fact>needRest parameter controls whether setToSetupPose is called before playing animation</fact>
    <fact>TrackEntry listeners handle animation events, completion, and interruption for promise resolution</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>SpineKit is the centralized animation controller for Spine animations in the astarte-framework extension. It wraps sp.Skeleton's animation API with Promise-based control flow, making it easier to chain animations sequentially. The PlayAnimation method intelligently preserves animation mixing settings by checking state.data.animationToMixTime before clearing tracks - if a mix duration exists between the current and target animation, it skips clearTrack to allow smooth blending. Audio synchronization is built-in via SetAudioClips, which maps animation names to AudioClip assets that play automatically when animations start. The method sets up comprehensive listeners for track events, completion, and interruption, resolving the promise appropriately. The m_cancelCbs registry enables external code to forcefully cancel in-flight animations. This architecture explains why BaseSpine.ts delegates to SpineKit rather than calling sp.Skeleton methods directly - SpineKit adds essential promise semantics and audio integration that raw Spine API lacks.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

</observation>

格不顯示）\\n     */\\n    SET_WHEEL_DATA: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SET_WHEEL_DATA',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback (選填) (result: SpinResult) => void\\n     */\\n    PLAY_SPIN: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_PLAY_SPIN',\\n\\n    /**@ch 顯示 UI*/\\n    SHOW_UI: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW_UI',\\n\\n    /**@ch 隱藏 UI*/\\n    HIDE_UI: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_UI',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（盤面下降+灰塵+光效；一個 round 僅一次，落在第一次轉動前）\\n     * @param callback (選填) () => void，動畫播畢回調（Spine 缺失立即回調，不 hang）\\n     */\\n    PLAY_ENTER: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_PLAY_ENTER',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（盤面回歸+中間功能暗掉；一個 round 僅一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）\\n     * @param callback (選填) () => void，動畫播畢回調（Spine 缺失立即回調，不 hang）\\n     */\\n    PLAY_EXIT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_PLAY_EXIT',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉\\n     * PlaySpin 後輪盤停住不自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束，由呼叫端 dispatch 此事件才繼續緩轉\\n     */\\n    RESUME_IDLE: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_RESUME_IDLE',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 隱藏結果展示牌（暫代落點演出的退場）\\n 緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager extends Component {\\n    //#region 屬性\\n    /**@ch 根節點（顯示/隱藏）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '根節點' })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 輪盤旋轉節點（轉動的是這個，頂端指針固定不動）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '輪盤旋轉節點' })\\n    private m_wheelNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格 icon 的 SpriteChange（順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteChange], displayName: '12 格 icon SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_segmentSpriteChanges: SpriteChange[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格乘倍數值 Label（非乘倍格留空字串；順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Label], displayName: '12 格乘倍數值 Label' })\\n    private m_segmentValueLabels: Label[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格落點演出節點（順序對應格 0~11；現僅供 DevAssertConfig 數量檢查，落點演出已改用結果展示牌）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌根節點（暫代落點演出：顯示落點 feature 符號；退場由 HIDE_RESULT 事件觸發）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '結果展示牌根節點' })\\n    private m_resultNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange（5 張圖索引對齊 TYPE_ICON_CONFIG，與 12 格 icon 同套索引）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange（背景隨落點 type 切換；5 張圖索引同 m_resultSpriteChange）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultBgSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BigWheel Spine（EyeStrike2_BigWheel）：進場 Active / 落點 Collect / 退場 Out / 待機 Idle，skin 依落點功能切換。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌（m_result* 已停用，僅保留屬性避免 prefab 反序列化警告）。\\n     */\\n    @property({ type: sp.Skeleton, displayName: 'BigWheel Spine' })\\n    private m_bigWheelSpine: sp.Skeleton = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade 直對；Shift 暫用 default；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 播 BigWheel Idle 待機呼吸\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n     error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 播 BigWheel Idle 待機呼吸\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin      this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayEnter(onDone?: () => void) {\\n /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.setSkin(skinName);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 單次（非循環）動畫，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * Spine 缺失 / 動畫名無效 → 立即 resolve（fail-loud warn），不 hang 呼叫端（DR-2 完成訊號鏈防 hang）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Active/Collect/Out）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpineOnce(animName: string): { });\\n                    resolve();\\n                });\\n            } else {\\n                warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpineOnce 動畫 \\\"${animName}\\\" 不存在，立即結束不 hang`);\\n                resolve();\\n            }\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 循環動畫（Idle 待機呼吸），不 await（循環動畫不等完成）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Idle）\\n     */\\n    private spine.setToSetupPose();\\n        spine.setAnimation(0, animName, true);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 FeatureWheel 功能\\n     * DIGIT_1：初始化 + 設定預設輪盤資料 + 顯示 UI（一鍵就緒）\\n      if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n      this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if content.thinking:
The primary session is refactoring the m_bigWheelSpine property from being a raw sp.Skeleton type to BaseSpine type. This continues the pattern established in the earlier import change - moving from direct Spine API usage to the BaseSpine wrapper which internally uses SpineKit.

The comment changes are also notable:
- Changed from "BigWheel Spine" to "BigWheel BaseSpine"
- Added instruction that playback goes through BaseSpine (which internally uses SpineKit, includes animation existence checks + setSlotsToSetupPose)
- Added instruction to drag the FeatureWheelResult node (which has BaseSpine component on it)

This is a refactor - changing the type of an existing property to use a wrapper class instead of the raw type.

  <subtitle>Changed BigWheel Spine property from raw sp.Skeleton to BaseSpine wrapper for consistent animation handling</subtitle>
  <facts>

    <fact>Property decorator updated from type sp.Skeleton to type BaseSpine with display name "BigWheel BaseSpine"</fact>

  <narrative>The m_bigWheelSpine property in FeatureWheelManager has been converted from the raw sp.Skeleton type to the BaseSpine wrapper class. This refactor enforces the project's standard pattern where all Spine animations should use BaseSpine, which provides standardized playback through SpineKit, automatic animation existence validation, and proper skin application with setSlotsToSetupPose. The comment now documents that the FeatureWheelResult prefab node should be dragged to this field, as it has a BaseSpine component attached. This type change will require corresponding updates to all methods that currently call raw sp.Skeleton APIs (setSkin, setAnimation, clearTrack, etc.) to instead use BaseSpine's wrapper methods.</narrative>

content.thinking:
This is a significant refactoring where the three Spine-related methods (SetSpineSkin, PlaySpineOnce, PlaySpineLoop) are being converted from using raw sp.Skeleton API calls to using the BaseSpine wrapper methods.

Key changes:
1. **SetSpineSkin**: Changed from `this.m_bigWheelSpine.setSkin(skinName)` to `this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin(skinName)` - now using BaseSpine's SetSkin method which includes setSlotsToSetupPose internally.

2. **PlaySpineOnce**: Completely rewritten from a manual Promise-based implementation (with clearTrack, setToSetupPose, setAnimation, setTrackCompleteListener) to simply calling `await this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, false)` - delegating to BaseSpine which internally uses SpineKit.

3. **PlaySpineLoop**: Changed from manual `clearTrack + setToSetupPose + setAnimation(0, animName, true)` to `this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, true)`.

This is completing the refactor - the property type was changed to BaseSpine in the previous edit, and now all the method calls are updated to use BaseSpine's API instead of raw sp.Skeleton API.

The code is significantly simplified - PlaySpineOnce went from ~20 lines of Promise/listener management to just 6 lines. This demonstrates the value of the wrapper pattern.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Delegate Spine Operations to BaseSpine Wrapper Methods</title>
  <subtitle>Replaced raw sp.Skeleton API calls with BaseSpine wrapper methods for skin and animation control</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>SetSpineSkin changed from m_bigWheelSpine.setSkin to m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin which includes setSlotsToSetupPose</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpineOnce simplified from 20-line manual Promise implementation to single await call to BaseSpine.PlayAnimation</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpineLoop changed from manual clearTrack/setToSetupPose/setAnimation sequence to BaseSpine.PlayAnimation with isLoop=true</fact>
    <fact>Manual track listener management and Promise resolution logic removed, delegated to SpineKit via BaseSpine</fact>
    <fact>Animation existence checks now handled internally by BaseSpine instead of local warn messages</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>All three Spine manipulation methods in FeatureWheelManager have been refactored to delegate to BaseSpine wrapper methods instead of calling raw sp.Skeleton APIs directly. SetSpineSkin now calls BaseSpine.SetSkin which automatically handles setSlotsToSetupPose after setting the skin. PlaySpineOnce was dramatically simplified from manual Promise construction with track listeners to a simple await on BaseSpine.PlayAnimation, reducing code from ~20 lines to 6. PlaySpineLoop similarly delegates to BaseSpine.PlayAnimation with the isLoop parameter set to true. This refactor eliminates duplicate Promise management logic, leverages BaseSpine's animation existence validation, and ensures consistent Spine handling across the codebase by routing all animations through the SpineKit wrapper. The fail-loud behavior (warning on missing animations without hanging) is preserved through BaseSpine's internal validation.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

The user is removing the temporary/placeholder comment and assertion for the SymbolConvert skin mapping. Previously, it was mapped to the default skin with a comment saying the art team hadn't provided the 'Shift' skin yet. Now the test is being updated to expect the actual 'Shift' skin, indicating that either:

1. The art asset has been added, or
2. They're updating the test to match the expected behavior even if the asset isn't in yet (to make the test fail-loud if the implementation doesn't match)

Looking at the previous context, the implementation in FeatureWheelTypes.ts still has a TODO comment saying "Shift 暫用 default（美術未補）", so this seems to be updating the test to the expected final behavior, which would make the test fail until the implementation is also updated.

This is a test update that changes from accepting a temporary workaround to expecting the correct final behavior.

/**\\n     * @ch 隱藏結果展示牌（暫代落點演出的退場）\\n     * PlayLandAnnounce 秀出展示牌後即 resolve、不自動收；由呼叫端在結果演出結束後 dispatch 此事件退場\\n     */\\n    HIDE_RESULT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_RESULT',\\n};\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 輪盤 UI 元件\\n * 單一職責：顯示 12 格、平時 Idle 緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager extends Component {\\n    //#region 屬性\\n    /**@ch 根節點（顯示/隱藏）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '根節點' })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 輪盤旋轉節點（轉動的是這個，頂端指針固定不動）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '輪盤旋轉節點' })\\n    private m_wheelNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格 icon 的 SpriteChange（順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteChange], displayName: '12 格 icon SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_segmentSpriteChanges: SpriteChange[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格乘倍數值 Label（非乘倍格留空字串；順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Label], displayName: '12 格乘倍數值 Label' })\\n    private m_segmentValueLabels: Label[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格落點演出節點（順序對應格 0~11；現僅供 DevAssertConfig 數量檢查，落點演出已改用結果展示牌）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌根節點（暫代落點演出：顯示落點 feature 符號；退場由 HIDE_RESULT 事件觸發）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '結果展示牌根節點' })\\n    private m_resultNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange（5 張圖索引對齊 TYPE_ICON_CONFIG，與 12 格 icon 同套索引）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange（背景隨落點 type 切換；5 張圖索引同 m_resultSpriteChange）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌背景 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultBgSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BigWheel（EyeStrike2_BigWheel）BaseSpine：進場 Active / 落點 Collect / 退場 Out / 待機 Idle，skin 依落點功能切換。\\n     * 播放走 BaseSpine（內部 SpineKit，含動畫存在檢查 + setSlotsToSetupPose）。拖 FeatureWheelResult 節點（其上有 BaseSpine）。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌（m_result* 已停用，僅保留屬性避免 prefab 反序列化警告）。\\n     */\\n    @property({ type: BaseSpine, displayName: 'BigWheel BaseSpine' })\\n    private m_bigWheelSpine: BaseSpine = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade 直對；Shift 暫用 default；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 播 BigWheel Idle 待機呼吸\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：回 default skin + 播 Idle 循環（呼吸效果）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 呼吸為兩獨立層\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayEnter(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Active);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayEnter onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（一個 round 一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）；播畢回調。\\n     * Out 的「中間功能暗掉」作用於當前落點 skin，故 setSkin(default) 放在 Out 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     *            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect content.thinking:
Two edits happened:

1. In FeatureWheelTypes.ts, they cleaned up the outdated TODO/warning comments about the Shift skin being temporary. The comments used to say the art asset wasn't ready and they're using default as a placeholder. Now the comments simply state that SymbolConvert maps to 'Shift' skin, aligned with EyeStrike2_BigWheel skins. They also removed the inline TODO comment and the escaped quotes.

2. In FeatureWheelManager.ts, they updated a comment in the PlayLandAnnounce method from saying "Shift 暫用 default" (Shift temporarily uses default) to "Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對" (Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift map directly).

Both changes are documentation cleanup to reflect that the Shift skin is now the final implementation, not a temporary placeholder.
